commands.purpose: Cross-tenant or tenant-scoped coupon view. --is-active filters to active codes. --include-deleted shows soft-deleted rows; default hides them.

Verbose read of one coupon: base fields + discount config + applicability + usage counter + issuance context + redemption summary + audit trail summary. Confidential financial fields print only when the caller has coupons.view-financials permission (checked via CLI --actor flag when running as a specific user).
Scriptable coupon creation (test harness + tenant onboarding). --dry-run validates input against every observer rule without persisting. Consumes 1 unit of `coupon_slot` entitlement.

Sets is_active=false. Fires CouponDeactivated with reason. Existing redemptions preserved. Does NOT release the `coupon_slot` entitlement unit — that only releases on delete OR nightly expiry sweep after valid_until passes.

Push valid_until forward. --valid-until sets an absolute new timestamp; --days adds N days to the current valid_until (or NOW() if not set). Refuses when coupon is deactivated OR when the new value is not strictly greater than current valid_until.

Medium+ tier. Batch-create N unique campaign codes for a named marketing campaign. Requires `coupon_bulk_issue` entitlement. Consumes count units of `coupon_slot` — refuses when count > remaining slots. --code-template supports substitutions: {RAND8} (8-char Crockford), {RAND4}, {SEQ} (1..N zero-padded), {CAMPAIGN} (kebab of campaign_name), literal characters.

Cross-tenant or tenant-scoped redemption ledger. Filter by coupon, customer, target, reversal state, date range. Confidential financial fields print only when the caller has coupons.view-financials permission.
Admin manual reversal (correction path — distinct from refund-cascade clawback). Sets reversed_at + decrements coupon.usage_count. Fires CouponRedemptionReversed. Audit-critical (records --reason).

Ad-hoc CLI equivalent of GET /coupons/report. --period-start/--period-end default to last 7 days. --format=csv|json|table. Writes to stdout (redirect to a file) OR to S3 when --to-s3 is set. Dispatches GenerateCouponUsageReportJob synchronously when --format=csv AND period > 30 days (large exports).

Cross-tenant or tenant-scoped clawback audit trail. Every reversed redemption over the period with clawback_reason + reversed_at + reversed_by_user_id + linked invoice/transaction. Compliance-facing — retained 7 years.
